name: accesspatch-eu
description: Diagnose, approve, patch, and verify blocking accessibility defects.

interface.shortDescription: Repair a blocked checkout with evidence and approval.
interface.longDescription: Run a localhost keyboard journey, inspect evidence, propose bounded repairs, require explicit human approval, patch only src/checkout, and verify the same journey.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use $accesspatch-eu:accesspatch to diagnose and safely repair the synthetic checkout.
